Premium Tailoring Since 1999

Outfits Crafted
For You,
Not the Rack.

Yogeshwar Tailor has been crafting perfect-fitting ladies garments for over two decades. From bridal blouses to designer kurtis — every stitch tells your story.

Our Promise

Why Choose Yogeshwar Tailor?

For over 25 years, our customers return to us for one simple reason — we never compromise on fit, quality, or trust.

straighten

Perfect Fitting Guarantee

Every garment is hand-measured and tailored specifically to your body. If the fit isn't perfect, we re-stitch it — free of charge.

verifiedSatisfaction Assured
workspace_premium

Experienced Since 1999

Our master tailors bring over 25 years of expertise. We have crafted more than 12,000 garments — each stitch reflects decades of skill.

verified25+ Years Legacy
person_pin

Custom Records

We record and save every customer's precise measurements. Your next order is even faster — no need for re-measurement every time.

verifiedPersonalised Records
diamond

Premium Stitching

We use only high-quality threads and hand-finishing to ensure your garment looks stunning and lasts for years.

verifiedPremium Finish
local_florist

Bridal Specialists

From intricate bridal blouses to festive wear, we specialise in outfits that make you feel like royalty.

verifiedWedding Experts
local_shipping

On-Time Delivery

We respect your time. Standard orders delivered within 7–10 days. Urgent stitching available on request.

verifiedReliable Always

Contact Us

Got Questions?

Frequently Asked
Questions

Everything you need to know before your first visit — answered honestly.

schedule
How long does stitching usually take?
add

Standard stitching takes 7 to 10 working days. For simpler garments like blouses, it can be ready in 5–7 days.

speed
Do you provide urgent stitching?
add

Yes! We offer urgent stitching on request for weddings and festivals. Additional charges may apply.

inventory_2
Can I bring my own fabric?
add

Absolutely! We welcome customer-provided fabric and handle it with the same master-level care.

save
Do you save my measurements?
add

Yes — we maintain a digital record of your fit, making future orders much faster and consistent.

Still have a question? We're happy to help.

support_agentAsk Us Anything
Yogeshwar.

Premium ladies bespoke tailoring since 1999. Every garment stitched with love, skill, and an unwavering commitment to the perfect fit.
